name: Page Template Service
description: A complete service business page template that composes hero, services, about, testimonials, booking, FAQ, and footer into a cohesive single-page website. Suitable for salons, dentists, plumbers, lawyers.
whenToUse: Use as a full-page template for service-based businesses like salons, dental offices, law firms, or home services.

props.name: businessData
props.description: Complete business data including name, services, hours, reviews

props.name: theme
props.description: Theme configuration with colors, fonts, and style preferences

props.name: sections
props.description: Ordered list of sections to include
